location: On a corpse inside the Abandoned Cave in Caelid, behind a Giant Poison Flower, reached by crossing a tree branch spanning a ravine from Smoldering Wall and climbing a pile of destroyed Abductor Virgin statues.
tactics: From Smoldering Wall grace, head east to the tree-branch crossing over the ravine leading to the cave entrance
The interior is heavily rot/poison-infested — bring Preserving Boluses or poison resistance
Climb the pile of broken Abductor Virgin husks near the giant poison flower to reach the weapon
No fight is required for the weapon itself, but the cave's innermost chamber holds two optional Cleanrot Knights further in
lore: A weapon built for the arena rather than the battlefield, said to have been carried by duelists exiled from gladiatorial combat — its bronze fitting, shaped like a serpent's head, holds a fang laced with potent poison rather than a blade meant for bleeding.

builds.name: Quality poison
builds.why: Balanced Str/Dex scaling and, unusually for this weapon type, inflicts Poison instead of Bleed — pairs well with Arcane investment or a Poison affinity to stack duration
